trackedEntityAttributes.name: HIV Program ID
trackedEntityAttributes.description: HIV Program ID (For example, ART Number)

translations.value: ID do programa de HIV (por exemplo, número ART)
ID du programme VIH (Par exemple, Numéro du TAR)

trackedEntityAttributes.name: GEN - Date of birth
trackedEntityAttributes.description: Date of birth. This field can also be used when the date of birth is estimated, in conjunction with another TEA that indicates whether the birth date is estimated.

translations.value: Date de naissance. Ce champ peut également être utilisé lorsque la date de naissance est estimée, conjointement avec un autre TEA qui indique si la date de naissance est estimée.
Fecha de nacimiento. Este campo también se puede utilizar cuando se estima la fecha de nacimiento, junto con otro TEA que indica si se estima la fecha de nacimiento.

trackedEntityAttributes.name: GEN - Date of birth is estimated
trackedEntityAttributes.description: TEA that indicates whether the 'date of birth' recorded is estiimated.

translations.value: GEN - La date de naissance est estimée
La date de naissance est estimée
TEA qui indique si la « date de naissance » enregistrée est une estimation.
Estimation de la date de naissance

trackedEntityAttributes.name: GEN - Family name
trackedEntityAttributes.description: Family name or last name of the patient of case.

translations.value: Nom ou Nom de famille du patient

trackedEntityAttributes.name: GEN - Sex
trackedEntityAttributes.description: Biological sex or sex assigned at birth (male, female, unknown).

translations.value: Sexe biologique ou sexe attribué à la naissance (masculin, féminin, inconnu)
Sexo biológico o sexo asignado al nacer (masculino, femenino, desconocido).

trackedEntityAttributes.name: GEN - National ID
trackedEntityAttributes.description: Unique identifier for a person that is managed and maintained at the national level; this type of identifier is not programme-specific. This may include, for example, a national health identification number, a national insurance number, or other similar unique identifier. This TEA is intended to be adapted to local context.

translations.value: Identificador único de una persona que se gestiona y mantiene a nivel nacional; este tipo de identificador no es específico del programa. Esto puede incluir, por ejemplo, un número de identificación nacional de salud, un número de seguro nacional u otro identificador único similar. Este TEA está destinado a ser adaptado al contexto local.

Identifiant unique d'une personne qui est géré et maintenu au niveau national ; ce type d'identifiant n'est pas spécifique à un programme. Il peut s'agir, par exemple, d'un numéro d'identification national de santé, d'un numéro d'assurance national ou d'un autre identifiant unique similaire. Ce TEA est destiné à être adapté au contexte local.

programRules.name: Assign BP Pre Hypertension HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'systole HF') && d2:hasValue( 'diastole HF')) && ((#{systole HF}  >=130  && #{systole HF}  <=139)   || ( #{diastole HF} >= 80 && #{diastole HF} <=89))

programRules.name: Assign Glucose Emergency Hyperglycemia HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method HF' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger HF' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method HF}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=400) ) || (#{Glucose test method HF}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=400)))

programRules.name: Assign BP Hypertension HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'systole HF') && d2:hasValue( 'diastole HF')) && ((#{systole HF}  >=  140  && #{systole HF}  <= 179)   || ( #{diastole HF} >= 90 && #{diastole HF} <=  109))

programRules.name: Assign Glucose HypoGlycemia
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger} < 70) ) || (#{Glucose test method}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger} <70)))

programRules.name: Hide Blood sugar status if  (mg/dl) is empty
CVD: RiskScoreGenerate_SMOKING_Yes
programRules.description: Needs "==TRUE" variant to compute on Android

programRules.name: Assign Oxygen saturation - High risk
programRules.description: show High risk if Oxygen saturation  < 95

programRules.name: Assign Glucose diabetes HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method HF' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger HF' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method HF}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=126   && #{Bloodsuger HF} <=399) ) || (#{Glucose test method HF}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=200  && #{Bloodsuger HF} <=399)))

programRules.name: Display Hypertension stage if BP status is Hypertenstion
Assign Glucose diabetes
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method}  =='fasting'  && #{Bloodsuger} >=126   && #{Bloodsuger} <=399)  || (#{Glucose test method}  =='random'  && #{Bloodsuger} >=200  && #{Bloodsuger} <=399))

programRules.name: Hide WC status if  WC is empty
Assign Glucose pre-diabetes
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger} >=101   && #{Bloodsuger} <=125) ) || (#{Glucose test method}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger} >=140  && #{Bloodsuger} <=199)))

programRules.name: Assign Glucose normal HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method HF' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger HF' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method HF}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=70 && #{Bloodsuger HF} <=100) ) || (#{Glucose test method HF}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=70  && #{Bloodsuger HF} <=140)))

programRules.name: Assign BP normal HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'systole HF') && d2:hasValue( 'diastole HF')) && ((#{systole HF}  >=90  && #{systole HF}  <=129)   || ( #{diastole HF} >= 60 && #{diastole HF} <=79))

programRules.name: Hide BP status if diast and systore are empty
Assign Glucose normal
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method}  =='fasting'  && #{Bloodsuger} >=70   && #{Bloodsuger} <=100 ) || (#{Glucose test method}  =='random'  && #{Bloodsuger} <=140 && #{Bloodsuger} >=70))

programRules.name: Hide HbA1c status if Hb1C (glycated hemoglobin) is empty
Hide O2 saturation status if  O2 is empty
hide BMI status if w and h are empty
Assign Glucose Emergency Hyperglycemia
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger} >=400) ) || (#{Glucose test method}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger} >=400)))

programRules.name: Assign Glucose pre-diabetes HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method HF' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger HF' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method HF}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=101   && #{Bloodsuger HF} <=125) ) || (#{Glucose test method HF}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} >=140  && #{Bloodsuger HF} <=199)))

programRules.name: CVD: RiskScoreGenerate_SMOKING_No

programRules.name: Assign Glucose HypoGlycemia HF
programRules.condition: (d2:hasValue( 'Glucose test method HF' ) && d2:hasValue( 'Bloodsuger HF' ))  && ((#{Glucose test method HF}  =='fasting'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} < 70) ) || (#{Glucose test method HF}  =='random'  && (#{Bloodsuger HF} <70)))
